## Recommendation

**Merge Branch B.**

Branch B satisfies all acceptance criteria with the smallest correct diff (4 lines),
uses idiomatic `auto` locals that make the alignment arithmetic auditable at a glance,
commits `m_offset` only after the bounds check passes (no intermediate corrupt states),
and introduces zero extra branches in the real-time hot path.

Branch A is equally correct but uses `std::size_t` explicitly where `auto` is idiomatic.
Branch C is over-engineered — the wrap-around guard addresses an unconfirmed scenario and
adds a hot-path branch at the cost of Article 8 compliance.
